skill_text:
Perform an HTTP POST request. Provide all required fields: `url`, and `value`.
When to use:
- Use `playwright_post` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- Provide all required fields: `url`, and `value`.
- Optional controls include `token`, `headers`.
- Use only when the request clearly needs `playwright_post`.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Do not use for adjacent tools with similar names, descriptions, or arguments.
- Do not use for read/write, search/fetch, create/update, delete/preview, or execute/explain mismatches.
- If the request lacks required fields, abstain or ask for clarification.
Argument template:
{"headers": {}, "token": "sample_token_1", "url": "https://example.com/resource", "value": "sample_value_1"}
Examples:
Minimal valid request that satisfies the required fields for playwright_post
{"url": "https://example.com/resource", "value": "sample_value_1"}
Richer invocation that uses optional controls for playwright_post
{"headers": {}, "token": "sample_token_2", "url": "https://example.com/resource", "value": "sample_value_2"}
